title: Papyrus Oxyrhynchus 840
source_edition: Grenfell & Hunt 1908, *The Oxyrhynchus Papyri* V. Public domain.
date_of_composition: Manuscript late 4th or early 5th century CE; underlying text 2nd century.
scope_note: A single-pericope fragment depicting Jesus debating temple purity with a Pharisee. Genuinely controversial regarding historicity but preserved in the canon for its synoptic-style controversy form.
completeness_note: Greek text not yet sourced into this JSON corpus; pending follow-up session.
follow_up_needed: Fetch Greek text from Grenfell & Hunt 1908; widely reprinted including in Bovon & Geoltrain *Écrits apocryphes chrétiens* I.
